nodes.body: <<FILL role=setup words=170 beats='{HERO_FULL} steps off the last bus into {TOWN}, the {ORCHARD} town where she was born, and finds it half a stranger to itself; the {WAR_MEMORIAL} lists names no one in the {TOWN_SQUARE} can place, her cousin {COUSIN} waves at a house {HERO} remembers as a {BAKERY}, and when she says the word {BAKERY} three people give her the same polite blank look; only {HERO} seems to carry the missing years, the vanished shopfronts, the empty chairs still pulled up to kitchen tables, and four threads tug at her at once, the {REC_LOCATION} records, the last living {ORCHARD}-{KEEPER_ROLE} on {KEE_LOCATION}, the family {PHO_MEDIUM}s that will not stay the same, and the sealed {CELLAR} beneath the old {CIDER_HOUSE}'>>

choices.label: Search the {REC_LOCATION} for the missing years.
Lay out the family {PHO_MEDIUM}s that keep changing.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=150 beats='The {REC_LOCATION} smells of dust and floor wax; the {REC_DOCUMENT} of {TOWN} births and deaths lies open, but whole pages are blank where names were inked, the paper faintly warm as if the words left only moments ago, and the young {REC_CHAR} keeps losing his place mid-sentence'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=135 beats='{HERO} leans across the counter and asks the {REC_CHAR} who lived at number nine on the {TOWN_SQUARE}, and watches him grope for a memory that keeps sliding out of reach'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=135 beats='The {REC_CHAR} whispers that he keeps a {PHO_MEDIUM} of a girl he is sure is his daughter, though he cannot summon her name or her face the moment he looks away from it'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=135 beats='{HERO} copies the blank entries into her own notebook, off the {REC_DOCUMENT}, hoping ink she carries out of {TOWN} will hold where the {REC_DOCUMENT} ink will not'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=135 beats='The {REC_CHAR} hands her a magnifier and together they find a birth entry where the name has thinned to a grey smear, present and absent at once'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=150 beats='{HERO} asks the {REC_CHAR} to say aloud a name he cannot hold, and his hands shake so hard the pen rolls off the desk, and she must choose between mercy and the answer she needs'>>

choices.label: Steady him and read on together.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=120 beats='The {REC_CHAR} panics, shoves {HERO} out and bolts the hall, and the one door into the {TOWN}s records closes against her'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=135 beats='The lease {REC_B_LEDGER} runs back two centuries in a dozen different hands, cracked and foxed, smelling of the same warm dust as the blank {REC_DOCUMENT}'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=135 beats='{HERO} traces the fortieth-year clause across the centuries and finds it always followed a hard season, a failed harvest, a fever, a flood, some grief the {TOWN} could not carry'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=135 beats='In the margin beside the newest clause someone has drawn a small tree with {ROOT}s far deeper than its branches, and inked beneath it the single word enough'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=135 beats='Every fortieth year the same clause reappears in careful script, a promise that the {ORCHARD} shall keep a little in exchange for a fruitful season'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=150 beats='The repeating clause always names a {KEEPER_ROLE}, and {HERO} can read the line calmly forward or tear the whole page free in fright'>>

choices.label: Trace the clause forward in the {REC_B_LEDGER}.
Rip the founding lease free and run.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=120 beats='Outside, the ink fades from the stolen page to nothing in {HERO} fist, her one hard fact turned to blank paper'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=150 beats='The last named {KEEPER_ROLE}, inked forty years ago, was {HERO}’s own {GRANDMOTHER}, and calmer now the {REC_CHAR} unlocks a back room where the forfeited years are shelved as sealed envelopes, one of them warm to the touch'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=135 beats='{HERO} breaks the warm seal and finds a {PHO_MEDIUM} of the {CIDER_HOUSE} {CELLAR} door standing open on darkness'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=135 beats='A second envelope holds a {REC_PHOTO} with a whole row of children scratched out, and a note reading they were the price of the year the mill burned'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=135 beats='{HERO} tucks the warm {PHO_MEDIUM}s inside her coat against her skin, as if her own heat could keep the images from fading like everything else in this {TOWN}'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=135 beats='Pencilled on the back of the first {PHO_MEDIUM} in a careful hand are the words it drinks from the {ROOT}, come before the next {DEADLINE}'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=150 beats='The envelope, the {REC_DOCUMENT}, the lease all point the same way, down to the {CIDER_HOUSE} {CELLAR} where something keeps the years'>>

choices.label: Carry what you found to the {CIDER_HOUSE}.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=150 beats='{KEE_LOCATION} is all wind and bent apple trees, and at the top {KEE_CHAR_FULL}, the last {ORCHARD}-{KEEPER_ROLE}, sits pruning by feel because her eyes have gone; she knows {HERO} by the smell of the road on her, and says you are the one it cannot swallow, sit'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=135 beats='{KEE_CHAR} speaks of {PHENOMENON}, the slow forgetting that rises from the {OLDEST_TREE} when the {TOWN} forgets to feed it a name'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=135 beats='She tells how the {FOUNDERS} knelt at the {SPRING} in a starving winter and begged the {ORCHARD} to take their grief, and how it learned that grief is only memory with the edges still sharp'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=135 beats='Every {KEEPER_ROLE} since has fed it one willing name a year, and the last to do so before the line broke was {HERO}’s own {GRANDMOTHER}'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=135 beats='She asks whether {HERO} is brave or only stubborn, because the two look alike right up until the very end'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=150 beats='{KEE_CHAR} waits for {HERO} to say what she means to do about the hunger on the hill, whether to starve it blindly or learn its price first'>>

choices.label: Ask what feeding it a name would truly cost.
Swear to starve it and feed it nothing.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=120 beats='{KEE_CHAR} decides {HERO} is a fool who will only make it hungrier, and sends her down the hill with a warning she cannot understand'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=135 beats='The {KEEPER_ROLE} keeps a knotted {KEEPER_CORD}, one knot for every {KEEPER_ROLE} back to the {FOUNDERS}, hung from a nail worn smooth by generations'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=135 beats='{KEE_CHAR} guides {HERO} thumb over each knot and names the {KEEPER_ROLE} it stands for, her voice steady until it reaches the knots no living mind can attach to a face'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=135 beats='Past those the {KEEPER_CORD} is smooth for a whole arm length, one lost {KEEPER_ROLE} after another, a rope of forgotten guardians holding a {TOWN} that does not know it is held'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=135 beats='The knots past a certain year are worn slick, as if handled by hands that no longer remember tying them'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=150 beats='The {KEEPER_CORD} runs long in {HERO}’s hands, and she can trace the knots back to the founding with {KEE_CHAR}, or cut the line to try to end it'>>

choices.label: Let {KEE_CHAR} guide your fingers along the knots.
Cut the {KEEPER_CORD} to break the line.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=120 beats='{HERO} saws the {KEEPER_ROLE} {KEEPER_CORD} in two and the loose knots scatter down the slope, cutting the last thread anyone held to the vanished years'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=150 beats='The {KEEPER_CORD} ends at her {GRANDMOTHER} knot, still tight and warm, with one fresh empty knot tied past it waiting for a name, and {KEE_CHAR} presses a withered {TOKEN_SEED} into {HERO} palm, the mark every {KEEPER_ROLE} carries'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=135 beats='{KEE_CHAR} says this is why {PHENOMENON} slides off you, you were never planted here, and describes the black {SPRING} under the {CIDER_HOUSE} where the founding {ROOT} learned to drink'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=135 beats='The {TOKEN_SEED} will green only in a hand {PHENOMENON} cannot touch, she says, and a green {TOKEN_SEED} is the {FOUNDERS} token, the sign that its bearer may bargain at the {SPRING}'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=135 beats='She cannot come down the hill on her own failing legs, but she promises to send {COUSIN} to the {CIDER_HOUSE} before the {DEADLINE} so {HERO} will not face the water alone'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=135 beats='She warns that the {ROOT} keeps what it takes and the first {DEADLINE} is only days away now'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=150 beats='{KEE_CHAR} last words send {HERO} to the {CELLAR}, where the oldest {ROOT} has cracked the founding wall and waits below in the dark'>>

choices.label: Carry what you found to the {CIDER_HOUSE}.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=150 beats='In {COUSIN} {PHO_LOCATION} the family {PHO_MEDIUM}s will not hold still; a christening portrait loses a godmother between two blinks, a harvest crowd thins by a face each time {HERO} looks away, and the empty spaces heal over as if the missing were never there'>>

choices.label: Try to catch the change in the act.
Search for a {PHO_MEDIUM} that will not change.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=135 beats='{HERO} lays every {PHO_MEDIUM} on the floorboards and pins the corners flat, determined to catch the erasure as it happens'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=135 beats='She films the pinned {PHO_MEDIUM}s on her phone, and on the small bright screen the vanishing happens slower, a face dimming frame by frame like a coal going grey'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=135 beats='When she plays the film back the erased faces are gone from the recording too, as if {PHENOMENON} reaches even into the memory of a machine that only borrowed the image'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=135 beats='For one heartbeat a woman stands at the {ORCHARD} gate, and then she is only a gap in the grass'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=150 beats='{HERO} can {PHO_MEDIUM} the {PHO_MEDIUM}s before they change, or panic and burn the fading ones to try to stop the bleeding'>>

choices.label: Photograph them and study who vanishes first.
Burn the fading prints in a panic.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=120 beats='{HERO} sets a match to the fading prints, and the fire takes the last images of the forgotten, so not even the gaps remain to prove anyone was lost'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=135 beats='One {PHO_ALBUM} feels wrong in the hand, heavier, its images sharp and whole while everything around them fades'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=135 beats='The strange {PHO_ALBUM} has no people in it at all, only the {ORCHARD} through the seasons, the {OLDEST_TREE} standing a little taller and a little darker in every passing year'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=135 beats='Pressed between two pages {HERO} finds {PHO_KEEPSAKE} tied with thread, saved by someone who knew the pictures of people would not last'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=135 beats='Every picture in it is of the {ORCHARD}, the {CIDER_HOUSE}, the {OLDEST_TREE}, as if {PHENOMENON} guards its own face'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=150 beats='{HERO} can compare the untouched {ORCHARD} {PHO_MEDIUM}s across the years, or close the strange {PHO_ALBUM} and walk away from it'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=120 beats='{HERO} closes the strange {PHO_ALBUM}, telling herself {PHO_MEDIUM}s are only paper, and by morning cannot recall why the {PHO_LOCATION} mattered, the thread slipping even from her'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=150 beats='Laid in order the {ORCHARD} {PHO_MEDIUM}s show the {OLDEST_TREE} swelling year by year while the {TOWN} around it grows thin, and behind the last {PHO_MEDIUM}, tucked in the frame, is {HERO}’s {GRANDMOTHER}’s young face beside the {CELLAR} door holding the same withered {TOKEN_SEED}'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=135 beats='On the {PHO_ALBUM} final page, in her {GRANDMOTHER} hand, are the words go down to the {ROOT} before {DEADLINE}, it keeps the years there'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=135 beats='{HERO} compares the christening {PHO_MEDIUM} to the {PHO_ALBUM} and realises the missing godmother was a {KEEPER_ROLE}, remembered by the {ORCHARD} while the {TOWN} forgot her face'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=135 beats='She understands now why the {ORCHARD} {PHO_MEDIUM}s never change, the {ROOT} protects the image of the thing that feeds it, guarding its own long hunger against forgetting'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=135 beats='The {PHO_MEDIUM}s, whole and fading alike, all point {HERO} at the {CIDER_HOUSE} {CELLAR}'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=150 beats='The changing pictures and the whole ones agree, the answer waits below the {CIDER_HOUSE} where the {ROOT} drinks'>>

choices.label: Carry what you found to the {CIDER_HOUSE}.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=150 beats='The {CIDER_HOUSE} leans empty at the {ORCHARD} edge, and its {CELLAR} door is sealed with a bar of {ORCHARD} wood grown over by living bark, as if the tree itself reached up to hold the door shut against anyone who would open it'>>

choices.label: Test how deep the cold air goes.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=135 beats='{HERO} works the {CEL_SEAL} bar loose splinter by splinter, and cold air breathes up from below'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=135 beats='The living bark bleeds a thin cider-smelling sap where her tools bite, and the whole door seems to flinch, wood shrinking from her like a hand pulled back from a flame'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=135 beats='Through the widening gap she can see the first steps slick with a {DEADLINE} that has no business being there in the mild autumn air of the {ORCHARD} above'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=135 beats='The draught carries a smell of apples and old water and something older underneath them both'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=150 beats='The open door gapes on darkness, and {HERO} can descend toward the pulsing light or lose her nerve and reseal it'>>

choices.label: Descend toward the pulsing light below.
Reseal the door and pretend you never came.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=120 beats='{HERO} hammers the bark bar back into place and walks away, telling herself some doors are shut for good reason, and the {TOWN} keeps losing its years'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=135 beats='{HERO} drops a pebble down the dark stair and counts, and the count runs longer than the little building could ever hold'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=135 beats='The pebble never lands, or lands so far down that its knock returns as a whisper, and the cold that rises with the echo carries the smell of a hundred old kitchens'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=135 beats='She lowers her lamp on its cord and the flame leans sideways, drawn downward as if the dark itself were breathing in, patient and slow and endlessly hungry'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=135 beats='The steps descend past shelves of cider gone to vinegar toward a faint light that is not lamplight, pulsing slow like breath'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=150 beats='{HERO} can follow the light down slowly, marking her steps, or retreat while she still remembers why she came'>>

choices.label: Mark the steps and go down slowly.
Retreat up the stair while you still can.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=120 beats='Halfway down {HERO} feels her own reason for coming thin and drain away, and she climbs back into daylight emptyhanded, the {CELLAR} having drunk her very purpose'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=150 beats='At the bottom the split wall lets the {OLDEST_TREE} taproot through, down into a black {SPRING}, and the water is not still, it holds faces and streets and seasons turning slowly in the deep'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=135 beats='The {SPRING} shows {HERO} her own reflection last of all, and hers alone does not dissolve into the drift of the drowned {TOWN}'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=135 beats='{HERO} kneels at the lip of the black water and the drowned faces turn up toward her lamp, mouths moving, asking to be remembered by anyone at all who still can'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=135 beats='Her {GRANDMOTHER}’s face drifts among them, younger than {HERO} ever knew her, and for one moment it steadies and seems to smile before the current turns it under again'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=135 beats='Scratched into the wet stone above the water are the words the {ROOT} keeps, the {DEADLINE} sets it, remember for us all'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=150 beats='The {CELLAR}, the {SPRING}, the drowned faces, every thread has led {HERO} to this same black water beneath the tree'>>

choices.label: Carry what you found to the {CIDER_HOUSE}.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=climax words=175 beats='However {HERO} came, every thread ends at the split founding wall beneath the {CIDER_HOUSE}, at the black {SPRING} where the {OLDEST_TREE} taproot drinks; here {PHENOMENON} has a shape at last, not a curse but a bargain, the {FOUNDERS} traded the {TOWN}s memory for a harvest that never fails, letting the {ROOT} keep a little each season, and the keeping has grown greedy, swallowing years and faces and whole lives while the {TOWN} smiles and forgets it ever had them; the {SPRING} turns with everything {TOWN} has lost, and {HERO} must decide how to face a thing that eats remembering itself'>>

choices.label: Reach into the {SPRING} to understand it.
Refuse it and try to wall the {ROOT} off.
Run and call {TOWN} to witness this.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=135 beats='{HERO} cups the black water and it does not take her memory, it shows her more, the {FOUNDERS} kneeling at this {SPRING} long ago'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=135 beats='The {SPRING} is warm as blood against her fingers and it does not pull at her, it only offers, showing the {FOUNDERS} faces smoothing as their grief is drawn away down into the {ROOT}'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=135 beats='She sees a {KEEPER_ROLE} walk willingly into the {ROOT}s embrace so the {TOWN} could forget a grief too heavy to carry through a hard winter'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=150 beats='The water offers {HERO} a deeper truth if she will hold it a moment longer, or she can draw her hand back cold and unchanged'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=120 beats='{HERO} holds the water too long and it shows her only the drowned faces turning, until she pulls back shaking, no wiser and much colder'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=135 beats='The {SPRING} teaches her that the {ROOT} cannot hold what it never touched, and {HERO} grew up far from {TOWN}, her memories banked elsewhere'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=135 beats='The lesson settles in her like cold water finding its level, that the girl the {TOWN} cannot swallow might be the one who can make it give back'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=135 beats='That distance is why {PHENOMENON} slides off her, and it may be the one thing that lets her reach in and take memory back out'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=135 beats='{HERO} tries to pack the split wall with stone and {ORCHARD} {B1B_CLAY}, but the {ROOT} only drinks around her hands, patient and unbothered'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=135 beats='The {B1B_CLAY} she packs turns to slurry and runs between her fingers into the {SPRING}, and the {ROOT} drinks even that, taking the very stone she meant to stop it with'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=135 beats='She understands you cannot wall off a hunger, you can only feed it or fill it with something it will keep'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=150 beats='The greening {TOKEN_SEED} in {HERO} palm steadies the faces where she touches the water, and she can learn from that or keep uselessly mortaring the wall'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=120 beats='{HERO} mortars the wall shut and for one proud hour it holds, then the {ROOT} splits it wider than before and a whole childhood of the {TOWN} drains away in the night'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=135 beats='Where {HERO} untaken memory touches the {SPRING} the drowned faces steady, as if her outsideness were a stone the current cannot move'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=135 beats='She sees she has been trying to plug a mouth when she should have been meeting a need, and a need can be answered with a gift as easily as with a theft'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=135 beats='Stopping {PHENOMENON} is not about closing a door but about giving the {ROOT} something it can keep forever instead of the living'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=135 beats='{HERO} runs up into the {TOWN_SQUARE} shouting the names from the blank {REC_DOCUMENT}, and a few townsfolk flinch as if the sounds fit old wounds'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=135 beats='She grabs old {B1C_NEIGHBOR_NAME} by the sleeve and says your wife, {B1C_NEIGHBOR_SPOUSE}, the {B1C_NEIGHBOR_SHOP}, and for a heartbeat his eyes fill and then go smooth again, the grief wiped clean before it can land'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=135 beats='Most only stare, unable to hold a grief for people they can no longer recall, their faces closing like shutters'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=150 beats='{COUSIN} keeps his memory a moment longer than the rest, and {HERO} can build on his stubborn love or shout herself hoarse alone'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=120 beats='The {TOWN_SQUARE} empties around {HERO} as she shouts, and by dusk even {COUSIN} looks at her strangely, and she stands alone with a fist of names no one will take'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=135 beats='{COUSIN} tells her {PHENOMENON} is weakest where love is stubborn, where someone flatly refuses to let go of a face'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=135 beats='One held memory is a crack of light under a shut door, proof that {PHENOMENON} can be resisted if enough hands refuse to let go all at once'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=135 beats='If enough of the {TOWN} could be made to remember at once, on purpose, their held memory might anchor what the {ROOT} keeps stealing'>>

<<FILL role=climax words=175 beats='The threads knot into one truth: {HERO} is immune because she grew up beyond {TOWN}, her memories rooted in soil {PHENOMENON} never owned, and that same outsideness is a key; she alone can reach into the {SPRING} and lift memory back out without being drunk down with it; {KEE_CHAR} withered {TOKEN_SEED}, greening now in her palm, is the {FOUNDERS} old token, the mark a {KEEPER_ROLE} carries, and it will let the {ROOT} recognise her as one who may bargain; but a bargain has a price, and the {ROOT} does not give years back for nothing, so {HERO} must learn what stopping {PHENOMENON} will cost before she can choose how much to pay'>>

choices.label: Weigh giving the {ROOT} a memory of your own.
Weigh taking the empty {KEEPER_ROLE}s place yourself.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=135 beats='{HERO} offers the {SPRING} a small memory to test its hunger, the taste of her {GRANDMOTHER} kitchen on a Sunday'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=135 beats='The returned {B2T_LANE} smells of coal smoke and Sunday baking, solid enough to walk down, and then the {ROOT} gently reminds her it is only lent, and the price is not yet paid'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=135 beats='The {ROOT} takes it gently and gives back, for one breath, a whole vanished {B2T_LANE} of houses shimmering into being'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=150 beats='So it is a trade, memory for memory, the beloved for the lost; {HERO} can measure the true cost or snatch her hand back now.'>>

choices.label: Snatch your hand back and keep everything.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=120 beats='Frightened by how much the {ROOT} will take, {HERO} pulls free and keeps every memory clenched tight, and the {TOWN} goes on quietly losing itself around her'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=145 beats='The {ROOT} will hold whatever she gives it forever, meaning whatever she surrenders she can never have again; she can follow the cost fully or give something rashly.'>>

choices.label: Follow the cost to its end.
Let it take a memory you cannot spare.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=120 beats='{HERO} lets the {SPRING} take her {GRANDMOTHER} whole, and the {B2T_LANE} returns, but she stands in it a stranger, unable to recall why the houses should mean anything at all'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=135 beats='{HERO} understands the true price now, to restore the {TOWN} she must feed the {ROOT} something she loves enough to lose'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=135 beats='The arithmetic is plain and cruel, the {TOWN} can be bought back memory for memory, and the buyer must be someone {PHENOMENON} cannot bill for its own'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=135 beats='The more she is willing to give, the more of {TOWN} will come rising back out of the deep'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=135 beats='{HERO} feels the fresh unnamed knot on {KEE_CHAR} {KEEPER_CORD} pull at her wrist, the empty {KEEPER_ROLE} place waiting to be filled'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=135 beats='The empty knot warms against her wrist like a living thing, eager, and she feels how easy it would be to simply give herself and let the whole {TOWN} forget its grief in peace'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=135 beats='She understands she could tie herself to it, become the one the {ORCHARD} remembers so the {TOWN} need not be devoured'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=150 beats='A {KEEPER_ROLE} is remembered only by the {ROOT} and forgotten by everyone else; {HERO} can study that fate or refuse it outright.'>>

choices.label: Decide that no one should have to vanish.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=120 beats='{HERO} refuses the {KEEPER_ROLE} knot and walks away from the {KEEPER_CORD}, and without a {KEEPER_ROLE} the {ROOT} simply keeps eating, until by winter {KEE_CHAR} herself is a name {HERO} alone remembers'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=145 beats='The price is to be slowly erased from the living world even while holding it together from below; she can grasp the whole of it or tie the knot too soon in fear.'>>

choices.label: Follow the cost to its end.
Tie yourself to the {KEEPER_ROLE} knot right now.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=120 beats='{HERO} ties the fresh knot around her own wrist before she understands the whole of it, and the {TOWN} steadies while she begins to fade from {COUSIN}’s eyes, a {KEEPER_ROLE} made in fear'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=135 beats='{HERO} sees the shape of the sacrifice, a {KEEPER_ROLE} anchors the {TOWN} by letting the {ORCHARD} keep her instead of the many'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=135 beats='A {KEEPER_ROLE} is loved only by the {ORCHARD} and lost to everyone above, and {HERO} is not ready to become a name that only a tree remembers, not yet, not in fear'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=135 beats='It is a life spent as the thing that remembers so that others may forget their grief in peace'>>

<<FILL role=climax words=180 beats='Now {HERO} knows the price in full; the {ROOT} will give the {TOWN} back its stolen years, but only if it is given something to keep forever in their place, either a memory beloved enough to matter or a {KEEPER_ROLE} willing to be remembered by the {ORCHARD} and forgotten by the world; {KEE_CHAR} climbs down the {CELLAR} stair to stand with her, and {COUSIN} comes too, refusing to let {HERO} face the {SPRING} alone, and their being there changes the arithmetic, because a price paid by one is a wound and a price shared by many is only a scar; at the black {SPRING} beneath the {OLDEST_TREE}, with the {DEADLINE} gathering above, {HERO} must choose not whether to pay but how, and who pays alongside her'>>

choices.label: Ask the whole {TOWN} to share the weight.
Offer the {ROOT} one thing to save one soul.
Bargain only to understand, not to win.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=135 beats='{HERO} sends {COUSIN} running through {TOWN} with the {REC_DOCUMENT} names, gathering everyone who will come to the {CIDER_HOUSE} before {DEADLINE}'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=135 beats='{COUSIN} comes back breathless with a dozen townsfolk behind him, then a dozen more, drawn by a feeling they cannot name that tonight they must not forget on purpose'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=135 beats='The plan is to make the {TOWN} remember together, out loud, all at once, so no single heart is drained to fill the {ROOT}'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=150 beats='{HERO} can teach the {ROOT} a new bargain of shared keeping, or let the {TOWN} simply make peace with its smaller losses.'>>

choices.label: Let {TOWN} forgive the {ORCHARD} and go home.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=discovery words=135 beats='{HERO} tells the gathered {TOWN} the {ORCHARD} was only lonely, and they choose to live with the losses, keeping what they have and mourning nothing they cannot name, a quiet peace with a quiet grief'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=145 beats='The weight must land on enough hands at once or it will crush the few who came; she can wait for all or rush the ritual.'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=120 beats='{HERO} begins before half the {TOWN} arrives, and the weight lands too heavy on too few, and the ones who came stagger back forgetting their own names, the chain snapping for want of hands'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=135 beats='{KEE_CHAR} shows {HERO} how to teach the {ROOT} a keeping spread across a hundred hearts rather than devouring one'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=135 beats='{KEE_CHAR}’s voice reaches them from the top of the stair, teaching the old words that turn a devouring into a keeping, a hunger fed by one into a memory held by all'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=135 beats='The living will hold the {TOWN} memory between them like a chain, and the {ROOT} will keep through many instead of hollowing anyone'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=135 beats='{HERO} cannot empty the whole {SPRING}, so she chooses one, kneeling with a single face fixed in her mind'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=135 beats='She fixes the {NEIGHBOR_GIRL} in her mind, the gap-toothed grin, the way she always won at {B3V_GAME}, a whole small life the {TOWN} lost the same winter {HERO} was taken away'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=135 beats='It is that girl she means to lift back into the light no matter the cost'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=150 beats='{HERO} can brace to trade a piece of her own heart for the one soul, or simply learn who she would have saved.'>>

choices.label: Only ask the {ROOT} to show you her face.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=discovery words=135 beats='{HERO} asks the {SPRING} only to show her who she would save, and it lifts a face to the surface, and she carries the knowing back up unspent, changed by it, having taken nothing and given nothing'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=145 beats='The {ROOT} offers one memory of {HERO}’s own for one soul restored; she can pay the fair price or try to cheat it.'>>

choices.label: Demand the {ROOT} give without taking anything.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=120 beats='{HERO} tries to pull one soul free while surrendering nothing, and the {ROOT} closes hard, keeping both the lost one and the hour she wasted, and she surfaces having saved no one'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=135 beats='{HERO} braces to give up one precious thing so that one lost person may walk {TOWN} again, remembered by all'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=135 beats='One rescue, complete and clean, is a candle lit against a dark she cannot flood with light, and she decides a single saved life is not too small a thing to matter'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=135 beats='It is a small and complete mercy in a sea she knows she cannot empty by herself'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=135 beats='{HERO} decides she does not need to defeat {PHENOMENON}, only to understand it well enough to live honestly beside it'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=135 beats='The {ROOT} shows her the {FOUNDERS} not as villains but as parents who could not bury one more child and still rise to prune the trees, and who made a terrible mercy of forgetting'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=135 beats='She asks the {ROOT} not for years but for the whole truth of the bargain the {FOUNDERS} made in their grief'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=150 beats='{HERO} can accept an even trade for a single year, or try to force the whole hard truth into the {TOWN} at once.'>>

choices.label: Take back one year on the {ROOT}s own terms.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=discovery words=135 beats='{HERO} accepts the old bargain and asks for a single year back, the year she was born here, and the {ROOT} gives it and keeps a year of hers, a fair and bittersweet swap that leaves her both fuller and lighter'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=145 beats='The {ROOT}s long memory is a grief no one mind can hold alone; she can carry it wisely or pour it into the {TOWN} uninvited.'>>

choices.label: Force the whole truth into every mind at once.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=120 beats='{HERO} tries to pour the {ROOT}s long memory into every mind in {TOWN}, and the {TOWN} reels, unable to bear a grief handed to them whole, and they turn from her, choosing forgetting over a truth too heavy'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=135 beats='The {SPRING} opens its long memory to {HERO}, the hard winters, the mercy and the theft tangled together as one old unhealed wound'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=135 beats='She means to meet the {OLDEST_TREE} the way you meet an old grief in the family, not to defeat it but to finally say aloud the names it has carried alone for two hundred years'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=135 beats='Carrying that understanding, she means to face the {OLDEST_TREE} not as an enemy but as the {KEEPER_ROLE} of a sorrow the whole {TOWN} must finally own'>>

<<FILL role=climax words=180 beats='Every path brings {HERO} to the same place at last, the black {SPRING} beneath the {OLDEST_TREE} with the first {DEADLINE} silvering the {ORCHARD} overhead, the {TOWN} gathered on the stair or a single face held in her mind; the withered {TOKEN_SEED} in her palm is green and whole now, the {KEEPER_ROLE} token alive again, and the {ROOT} waits, ancient and patient, ready to make its bargain; this is the hinge of everything, the moment {PHENOMENON} can be turned from a hunger into a keeping, from a theft into a shared remembering, or lost for another forty years; whatever {HERO} carries down to the water now, the {TOWN} memory, a single name, an honest grief, she must offer it here and see what the {ORCHARD} chooses to give back'>>

choices.label: Anchor the whole {TOWN}s memory at once.
Bind the shared vow of the living into the {ROOT}.
Save the one soul you came to lift.
Accept the bittersweet trade and let go.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=155 beats='{HERO} presses the greening {TOKEN_SEED} to the black water and speaks the {FOUNDERS} bargain backward, not the {ORCHARD} keeps for us but we keep for the {ORCHARD}, and the {ROOT} shudders as a hundred living memories pour down the {CELLAR} stair at once'>>

choices.label: Steer the flood of memory together.
Falter as the current grows too strong.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=120 beats='The flood of remembering is more than {HERO} can steer alone, and it scatters before it can anchor, leaving the {TOWN} dazed and the {ROOT} fed just enough to sleep, the great chance spent for a fragile partial calm'>>

<<FILL role=climax words=160 beats='With {KEE_CHAR}’s hands over hers and {COUSIN}’s voice leading the crowd, {HERO} teaches the {ROOT} the new bargain, and the {SPRING} stops turning like a drain and begins to turn like a wheel, holding the {TOWN}’s memory for it rather than swallowing it'>>

choices.label: Seal the new keeping into the {ROOT}.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=155 beats='{HERO} asks the gathered {TOWN} not to give up anything they love but to promise together, aloud, to remember, and the vow rises off them like warmth off a fire, and the {ROOT} leans toward it, curious at a thing offered freely'>>

choices.label: Lose the crowds nerve at the last moment.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=120 beats='The crowds nerve fails as the {SPRING} stirs, and one by one they climb back toward the light, and {HERO} is left holding a vow no one will finish speaking, the {ROOT} settling back to its slow patient theft'>>

<<FILL role=climax words=160 beats='The shared vow spreads thin across every heart in the {CELLAR} so no single person is drained, and the {ROOT}, offered a keeping it can hold without hollowing anyone, accepts the new bargain the way dry ground accepts rain'>>

choices.label: Seal the shared keeping for good.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=climax words=170 beats='The {ROOT} accepts the shared keeping and the split wall knits shut with living bark, and up in the {ORCHARD} the vanished years come rising back into the {TOWN} like dawn filling a valley, streets, faces, the {BAKERY}, the {NEIGHBOR_GIRL}, all of it remembered at once by everyone who chose to hold it'>>

choices.label: Watch {TOWN} wake into its whole self.
Notice the one gap the flood did not reach.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=completion words=155 beats='{TOWN} wakes whole, every stolen year restored and now held safe by a {TOWN} that remembers on purpose, the {ORCHARD} bearing fruit without eating its {KEEPER_ROLE}s, and {HERO} stands in a {TOWN_SQUARE} full of names that finally fit their faces, the girl who taught a {TOWN} to keep itself'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=150 beats='One face stays missing, {HERO}’s own {GRANDMOTHER}, the last {KEEPER_ROLE}, whose memory the {ROOT} has held longest and deepest, and {HERO} realises she can leave her in peace or reach once more for the one soul the flood passed by'>>

choices.label: Let her rest and keep the rest whole.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=success words=150 beats='{HERO} reaches one last time and lifts her {GRANDMOTHER} up out of the deep water, and the old {KEEPER_ROLE} opens her eyes in a {TOWN} that suddenly remembers loving her, and the two of them stand in the restored {ORCHARD}, the long debt paid and the family whole again'>>

<<FILL role=completion words=150 beats='{HERO} lets her {GRANDMOTHER} rest where she chose to be, remembered now by the {ROOT} as the {KEEPER_ROLE} who gave the {TOWN} its second chance, and {TOWN} lives on whole around that one gentle absence, a scar it will honour instead of forget'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=155 beats='{HERO} holds one face steady in her mind, the {NEIGHBOR_GIRL} lost the winter she left, and offers the {ROOT} a single memory of her own in fair trade for that one life lifted back into the {TOWN}'>>

choices.label: Give the memory freely for the one.
Hesitate over which memory to lose.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=120 beats='{HERO} hesitates too long over which piece of herself to give, and the {DEADLINE} closes over the {SPRING} for another year, and the {NEIGHBOR_GIRL} stays a face in a fading {PHO_MEDIUM}, so close to saved that the near miss aches'>>

<<FILL role=climax words=160 beats='{HERO} gives up her own first summer in {TOWN}, a small bright thing she can spare, and the {ROOT} takes it gently and lifts the {NEIGHBOR_GIRL} up out of the water, blinking, alive, remembered again by a {TOWN} that mourned her without knowing why'>>

choices.label: Bring the one you saved up into the light.
Ask if you might save one more.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=success words=155 beats='{HERO} climbs the {CELLAR} stair with the {NEIGHBOR_GIRL} beside her into a {TOWN} that gasps to remember her, and though {PHENOMENON} still sleeps below and the wider loss remains, one whole life walks {TOWN} again, bought back with a summer {HERO} will never miss as much as this is worth'>>

<<FILL role=success words=150 beats='The {ROOT} will give no more than the fair one for one, and {HERO} accepts it, choosing not to bleed herself dry chasing everyone, and she walks home with the {NEIGHBOR_GIRL} and a hard gentle wisdom, that saving one completely is worth more than failing at saving all'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=155 beats='{HERO} kneels at the water not to win but to be honest with it, and she offers the {ROOT} her own memory of the day she first understood the {TOWN} was disappearing, trading her certainty for a single year given back to {TOWN}'>>

choices.label: Accept the even trade and let go.
Grasp for more than the {ROOT} will give.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=120 beats='{HERO} asks for more years than she offered, and the {ROOT}, patient and exact, keeps what she gave and grants nothing, and she surfaces poorer by one memory and richer by no restored year, taught the cost of grasping'>>

<<FILL role=climax words=160 beats='The {ROOT} takes {HERO} certainty and gives back the year she asked for, the {BAKERY} on the {TOWN_SQUARE} with its warm lit window, and she understands she has not defeated {PHENOMENON} but made an honest peace with it, a fair exchange between a girl and an old grief'>>

choices.label: Carry the one restored year home.
Hold back one thing you will never give.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=discovery words=145 beats='{HERO} climbs into a {TOWN} with one more street than it had that morning, carrying a little less of herself and a little more of {TOWN}, and settles into the bittersweet knowledge that some things return only when we agree to let other things go'>>

<<FILL role=discovery words=155 beats='{HERO} promises the {ROOT} a yearly visit, a {KEEPER_ROLE} who tends rather than surrenders, trading a single memory each {DEADLINE} for a single year returned, and she chooses to spend her life this way, slowly buying {TOWN} back one season at a time, neither wholly winning nor losing'>>

<<FILL role=setback words=125 beats='Unwilling to feed the {ROOT} anything she truly loves, {HERO} keeps back one thing it can never take, a single {PHO_MEDIUM} of the {ORCHARD} gate held so tight it creases, and she walks home with the {TOWN} still thinning around her, one saved image of everything lost'>>
